title: Methods of Contraception
question: prevent ovulation / menghalang proses pengovulan
D: Intrauterine Contraceptive Device, IUCD / Alat kontraseptif dalam uterus, IUCD

question:
to prevent the sperm from entering the vagina during ejaculation / 
menghalang sperma daripada memasuki faraj semasa ejakulasi.
D: Intrauterine Contraceptive Device, IUCD / Alat kontraseptif dalam uterus, IUCD

question: to prevent implantation / mengelakkan penempelan
D: Intrauterine Contraceptive Device, IUCD / Alat kontraseptif dalam uterus, IUCD

question:
to prevent the sperms from being transported to the urethra / 
tiada sperma yang dipancutkan semasa ejakulasi
D: Intrauterine Contraceptive Device, IUCD / Alat kontraseptif dalam uterus, IUCD

question:
to prevent the ovum from being transported to the uterus / 
untuk mengelakkan ovum daripada diangkut ke uterus
D: Intrauterine Contraceptive Device, IUCD / Alat kontraseptif dalam uterus, IUCD
